pre-push:
parallel: true
hooks/scripts/validate-branch-name.sh
npm run lint
npm run lint:readability:ci
npm run lint:js
npm run lint:md
npm run lint:py
npm run lint:sh
node scripts/global/megalint/index.js
node scripts/global/closeout-preflight.js
node scripts/global/test-evidence-validator.js --diff-only
